name: Marathon Petroleum Corp
summary: Marathon Petroleum Corporation (MPC) is an integrated downstream energy company operating through refining and midstream segments. MPC refines crude oil into products including gasoline (CBOB, CARBOB), ultra-low sulfur diesel, and other liquid hydrocarbons. Its midstream operations are conducted through MPLX LP, handling natural gas liquids, pipeline transportation, and storage. MPC trades on the NYSE under ticker MPC.
